title: search without expand, escape to clear search, multiple search criteria,
author: hungrysnake
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
1. default search all connections/folders without manually expanding all before search
2. search multiple criteria (eg. 1. search pattern: newyork*routers, 2. search name + protocol or other attribute)
3. press "escape" to cancel search (currently i have to mouse click to clear the search field)

currently i have to expand all folders before search, it is not a big issue but seems it is unnesssary. i think is expected behav...

iterations.description: This issue requests several enhancements to the connection tree search functionality, improving usability and search capabilities.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): This issue requests several enhancements to the connection tree search functionality, improving usability and search capabilities.
Approach: 1. Implement 'Escape to clear search' functionality in ConnectionTreeWindow.cs by handling the KeyDown event for the search textbox. 2. Modify ConnectionTree.ApplyFilter in ConnectionTree.cs to optionally prevent automatic expansion of nodes after filtering, possibly controlled by a user setting. 3. Extend the search parsing logic within ConnectionTree.ApplyFilter to support multiple search criteria, which may involve changes to MrngSearchBox.cs for input handling.
